creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Luiz Gustavo wrote on 11.05.2012 22:37:
> Em Sex, 2012-05-11 às 22:27 +0400, Ruslan Mahmatkhanov escreveu:
>
>> Hi Luiz,
>>
>> This port has two major issues:
>>
>> - it depends on textproc/py-whoosh that we have not in the ports tree
>> - port is missing pkg-plist file, so it can be deinstalled correctly
>>
>
> For a rapid reply, I created a port for this depend:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=167185

Good! But it missing pkg-plist too :)
You can check your ports for issues like this:
- install ports-mgmt/portlint and run it in new port directory: it will
   report any problem it aware about
- make sure that command `make install && make deinstall` in port
   directory didn't produce any errors (pkg-plist problem should seen
   there)

[...]

 > Nice, that's right, I'm still learning how to do port, this is my second
 > port :) (my first is: www/luakit)
 >
 > Thank you for the help

That's ok, we all learning constantly :)

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
